title: Profile production performance using Flame Graphs and perf
description: Profile production Node.js applications using tools like Flame Graphs and `perf`. Identify 'Hot Functions' and CPU-bound bottlenecks within the V8 optimization pipeline. Analyze profiling data to pinpoint performance regressions and areas for optimization.
objectives: Profile production Node.js applications using tools like Flame Graphs and `perf`.
Identify 'Hot Functions' and CPU-bound bottlenecks within the V8 optimization pipeline.
Analyze profiling data to pinpoint performance regressions and areas for optimization.
